name: vanta-mcp
description: MCP server for Vanta REST API — access frameworks, controls, tests, evidence documents, vendors, vulnerabilities, policies, people, and integrations through AI assistants.
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to your Vanta GRC data. Browse frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, etc.), inspect controls and test results, hunt evidence-document gaps, review vendor risk, triage vulnerabilities, and pull integration resource inventories. OAuth2 client_credentials auth with proactive token refresh and cursor-based pagination.

vanta_client_id.title: Vanta Client ID
vanta_client_id.description: OAuth2 client ID from Vanta Settings -> API Tokens. Used with client_secret to mint bearer tokens against POST https://api.vanta.com/oauth/token.

vanta_client_secret.title: Vanta Client Secret
vanta_client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret paired with the client ID. Tokens are minted on demand, cached for ~1 hour, and refreshed proactively (token endpoint is limited to 5 req/min).

vanta_base_url.title: Vanta API base URL (optional)
vanta_base_url.description: Optional. Defaults to https://api.vanta.com/v1. Only set this if Vanta has moved you to a non-default shard.
